What We Do

Our Services

Built for commercial operations, industrial facilities, and bioethanol plants that demand a surface done right — every time.

01
Industrial Sandblasting

High-powered abrasive blasting for large-scale commercial and industrial projects. Tanks, structural steel, vessels, and manufacturing components handled with precision, integrity, and zero shortcuts.

02
Rust Removal

Corrosion is the enemy of uptime. We blast rust down to bare metal on commercial equipment, trailers, and industrial structures — restoring function and extending service life.

03
Paint Stripping

Complete removal of old paint, failed coatings, and industrial finishes. Craftsman-grade prep work that ensures your next coating bonds properly and lasts.

04
Surface Prep

The foundation of every lasting finish. We profile and prepare commercial surfaces to precise standards — the kind of prep that makes the difference between a coating that holds and one that fails.

05
Restoration

Farm equipment, commercial trailers, heavy machinery — restored with the craftsmanship they deserve. We take pride in bringing back what others write off.

06
Liquid Painting

Professional liquid paint application following blast and prep. Smooth, even, durable coverage on commercial equipment, metal structures, tanks, and fabricated parts — applied with the care of a craftsman.

Get a Quote
01 — Our Foundation
Pride

We don't hand off a project unless we're proud of it. Every surface we touch reflects our name — and we take that seriously.

02 — Our Standard
Integrity

Honest pricing. Straight talk. We tell you what the job needs and we do exactly what we say. No surprises, no shortcuts.

03 — Our Craft
Craftsmanship

Surface work done right takes skill, patience, and attention to detail. We bring that to every commercial project, every single time.

Who We Serve

Built for Commercial
& Industrial Work

Sargent Resurfacing LLC isn't a residential touch-up shop. We specialize in demanding, large-scale commercial and industrial surface work that requires real equipment, real expertise, and a team that shows up with pride, integrity, and craftsmanship on every job.

We're proud to serve bioethanol production facilities — where surface integrity on tanks, vessels, and processing equipment isn't just cosmetic, it's operational. Proper blasting and coating protects your assets and keeps your plant running.

Whether you're a plant manager scheduling seasonal maintenance, a contractor needing surface prep for a commercial build, or a fleet operator fighting rust — we have the capacity, experience, and work ethic to get it done right.

Talk to Cody About Your Project
Bioethanol Plants

Tanks, vessels, processing equipment, and structural steel. Precision prep, durable coatings, minimal downtime.

Commercial Construction

Surface prep for new builds and renovations. Structural steel and commercial infrastructure blasted to spec.

Fleet & Equipment

Commercial trailers, farm fleets, and heavy equipment. Rust removal, paint stripping, and liquid painting.

Industrial Manufacturing

Parts, machinery, and components done with craftsmanship — not just speed. For fabricators who demand quality.

The Sargent Difference

Why Commercial
Operations Choose Us

100%Satisfaction

Pride in Every Project

We don't cut corners and we don't hand off work we're not proud of. Our standard is the same on job #1 and job #100.

Integrity You Can Count On

Straightforward pricing, honest timelines, no hidden surprises. Especially critical for bioethanol facility operators who need to plan.

True Craftsmanship

Professional, high-capacity blasting equipment combined with skilled technique. Not rushed, not sloppy — done right the first time.

Minimal Downtime

Our efficient process gets your equipment, tanks, or facility surfaces back in service as fast as possible — without sacrificing quality.

Local, Accountable & Invested

Cody runs every job personally. Direct communication, local accountability, and a contractor who treats your facility like his own.

Meet the Owner

Built on Hard Work
& Grit

Cody Sargent founded Sargent Resurfacing LLC on three non-negotiables: pride, integrity, and craftsmanship. In Southwest Minnesota, those aren't just words — they're how business gets done.

With years of hands-on experience across commercial, agricultural, and industrial surface restoration, Cody has earned a reputation among bioethanol facilities, construction contractors, and equipment operators who can't afford to trust the wrong crew.

When Cody shows up, you get his personal attention, his best work, and his word — backed by the integrity that defines everything Sargent Resurfacing does.
